testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. HTTP connect timed out Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-73K6JOR', ip: '192.168.1.7'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure.
